texto: Keep in mind that when we limit our exposure to information, or when information itself is scarce, our picture of reality suffers. We become oblivious to both opportunities and hazards. Trends become invisible. History disappears. It's really just two sides of the same coin: the first commitment is as much a commitment to gathering information, from as many sources and in as much volume as can constructively be used, as it is a commitment to facing the facts.
explicacao: Citação de John Salka sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Keep in mind that when we limit our exposure to information, or when information itself is scarce…” articula reflexao, information, commitment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
